KeepLoaded: Do you dare enter the Twilight Realm?\nThe choice is yours...

My name is [FFFFFF]AuroraGiggleFairy[-] and welcome to my server!

I created this server to have a fun space to play 7d2d and expand my abilities as a modder:
  - making new mods, making mods work together, improving my mods... modding is life.

By joining my server you have essentially become my guinea pig! [FFFFFF]*Evil Laugh*[-]

My biggest goal is to create an enjoyable 7d2d experience that is ever expanding!

Feedback and suggestions are both [FFFFFF]WELCOMED[-] and [FFFFFF]PIVOTAL[-] for success!

This [FFFFFF]Server Information Window[-] is available in game by pushing [FFFFFF]ESC[-]. Hopefully you can find ALL The details you may need.

Please join my [FFFFFF]Discord[-] as information and updates are shared there. [FFFFFF](Discord Link Above)[-]

Again, welcome to my [8DB580]Twilight Realm[-]!

Happy modding... erm... HUNTING... and Enjoy!

- [FFFFFF]AGF[-]

[8DB580]1.[-] PvE ONLY, which means please respect people's builds, homes, and things.

[8DB580]2.[-] You ARE allowed to take over a POI as a base.

[8DB580]3.[-] You may play with Twitch Integration, but please keep away from other people's things just in case.

[8DB580]4.[-] Use the ally system with only people in your crew, and use passwords on all storages and doors.

[8DB580]5.[-] Use your 5 landclaims and only use them on your territories.

[8DB580]6.[-] RESIST giving things away for free! Make outsiders pay!!!

[8DB580]7.[-] Any issues, please report to [FFFFFF]AuroraGiggleFairy[-] directly in discord. [FFFFFF](Discord Link Above)[-]

[8DB580]VISITING A TRADER?[-]
 - PLEASE keep the trader gates closed!!! Help keep trader areas safe.

[8DB580]QUESTING WITH OTHERS?[-]
 - Unless quest owner states otherwise, owners get loot room and reading material.

[8DB580]WANT TO AVOID BLOODMOON?[-]
 - If you are the only one online, please log off by noon before blood moon.

[8DB580]USING SOMEONE'S BLOODMOON BASE?[-]
 - Unless base owner states otherwise, help repair and/or provide resources.

[8DB580]FINISHED BLOODMOON WITH OTHERS?[-]
 - Unless player states otherwise, try sharing the loot bags evenly.

[8DB580]/report[-] an optional way to report a bug to AGF.
[8DB580]/loc[-] to share your coordinates in chat.

Want your name in a different color? Let AGF know!

More will become available soon.

[8DB580]04/04/2026[-]

[8DB580]02/08/2026[-]
- Fixed the mod issue on the Thompson T3.
- Other fixes.

[8DB580]02/06/2026[-]
- FarmingPlus update: Replantable Seeds!

[8DB580]02/03/2026[-]
- Added Server UI windows.
- Foods from mod now stack to 50 instead of 25.

[8DB580]STABILITY LENS[-]
- You can see the stability of your builds by checking [FFFFFF]'Show Stability'[-].
- The toggle button is on this page to the right of the title.

[8DB580]VEHICLE NOTES[-]
- While on a vehicle, [FFFFFF]honking[-] opens and closes doors and gates! ([FFFFFF]X[-] on keyboard, [FFFFFF]LB[-] on xbox controller)
- Vanilla Vehicles have extra seating. (Up to 3 on the bikes, without seating expansion installed.)

[8DB580]TIME INFORMATION[-]
- A full 24 hour day in game is 2 Real Life Hours.
- 1 in game hour is approximately 5 Real Life Minutes.
- Morning starts at 4.
- Night starts at 22.

[8DB580]OTHER[-]
- Air Drops will spawn zombies... heeeheeeheee.
- Can you get the [FFFFFF]Master Tool?[-] *hint hint*
- [FFFFFF]Purple Book[-] will show you lots of information, including stuff from installed mods.
     - Button is located on inventory screen at the top center, next to the crafting button
- Trees, Crops, Farmplots, and Dew Collectors have a [FFFFFF]x5[-] and [FFFFFF]x25[-] version. (Not yet for the Apiary.)
- Trader selling prices are REALLY high!
- Use the [FFFFFF]Foundation Block[-] to make a block flushed to terrain.
